## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## User scenario

Example:

> As a meeting participant, I want ALDA to help me prepare questions before a negotiation so that I can enter the meeting with more confidence.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative solution?

## Impact

Who benefits from this feature?

- [ ] Individual professionals
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Small teams
- [ ] Portuguese-speaking communities
- [ ] Local-first AI users
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples or references if useful.
